HHPlOP: Position of respondent in household relative to household core
HHLft1: Number of household members under 6 years old
HHLft2: Number of household members aged 6 to 11

HHLft4: Number of household members aged 18 or older
GemGr: Population size class of residential municipality

HHRijbewijsMo: Number of motorcycle licenses in household
HHRijbewijsBr: Number of moped licenses in household
HHAuto: Number of passenger cars in household
HHAutoL: Number of passenger cars leased or in company name in household
OPAuto: Number of passenger cars in respondent’s name

OPSnor: Number of light mopeds (25km/h) in respondent’s name

FqAutoP: Frequency of using car as passenger

RdWrkB: Reason B work location not always reachable

KReisduur: Travel duration class in the Netherlands

SVvm1: First transport mode of trip series
